name: Card

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Modular surface for grouping related information
Dashboard-style panel with header and metric body

representativeVariants.name: Default Card with Header
representativeVariants.whySelected: Primary card pattern — dark surface with header separator and content body
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header row: title '数据分析' (font-weight semibold, font-size h4) + ghost button '导出报告'; Body: two stat rows with label '总访问量' value '12,847' and label '活跃用户' value '3,421'

representativeVariants.name: Outlined Card (body only)
representativeVariants.whySelected: Minimal card — border only, no header, for compact content slots
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Single paragraph: '系统运行正常，所有服务可用。' with small timestamp '更新于 2 分钟前' in muted color

representativeVariants.name: Elevated Card
representativeVariants.whySelected: Card with subtle shadow for modal-like emphasis in content flow
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Header: title '用户管理' + tag '活跃'; Body: 3-row user list with avatar circle, name, and role label

anatomy.description: Optional top section with title and actions, separated by 1px border-bottom
Optional bottom section for actions, separated by 1px border-top

structurePatterns: Header: flex row, justify between, align center, padding-bottom var(--space-3), border-bottom 1px solid var(--color-border)
Footer: flex row, justify end, gap var(--space-3), padding-top var(--space-3), border-top 1px solid var(--color-border)

bestPractices: Default card for dashboard panels and data groupings
Use header-body-footer for actionable cards with footer buttons
Elevated variant sparingly for emphasis — brand prefers flat

doNotInvent: Heavy shadows (max shadow-2 for elevated variant)
unknowns: Card width is flexible — determined by grid context
keyInsightSeed: Dark surface container with subtle border, modular content zones
